Object# PendingChangesMismatchError

Advanced Commerce API 1.1+

```
object PendingChangesMismatchError
```

## [Properties](/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/PendingChangesMismatchError#properties)

`errorCode``number`

 Value: `4000180``errorMessage``string`

 Value: `Pending subscription changes must specify a renewalItem, and if there are no pending changes, a renewalItem cannot be specified.`## [See Also](/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/PendingChangesMismatchError#see-also)
